title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 10 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 10 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 10 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/09/2025
Today, the iron ore futures market opened weak but then strengthened, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 805, up 0.25% slightlyfrom the previous trading day. Traders sold goods in line with market conditions; steel mills gradually accepted higher prices and purchased as needed. The overall market trading atmosphere was moderate.
